REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-09-2017 - REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-09-2017 IN DEPT. 502 - COURT TRIAL HELD, PARTIES TESTIFY: THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND WILL AWARD IN FAVOR OF ALDO ROSACIO AND AGAINST LUCITA BONAFACIO IN THE AMOUNT OF $580,497.00. AFTER HEARING ORAL ARGUMENT AND REVIEWING ALL SUBMITTED BRIEFINGS,PURSUANT TO PROBATE CODE 859, THE COURT WILL DOUBLE THE ORIGINAL AWARD, AND A JUDGMENT THE AMOUNT OF $1,160,994.00, WILL ENTERED IN FAVOR OF ALDO ROSACIO AND AGAINST DEFENDANT LUCITA BONAFACIO. THE COURT WILL ALSO AWARD IN FAVOR OF ALDO ROSACIO AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ROSARIO BONAFACIO, THE SUM OF $94,350.00. AFTER HEARING ORAL ARGUMENT AND REVIEWING ALL SUBMITTED BRIEFINGS, AND PURSUANT TO PROBATE CODE 859, THE COURT WILL DOUBLE THE AWARD, AND A JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $188,700.00 WILL ENTERED IN FAVOR OF ALDO ROSACIO AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ROSARIO BONAFACIO. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON,II; CLERK: R. GOULDING; NOT REPORTED ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 502 ON APR-14-2017 AT 8:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.

Defendants Counsel Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Higa of Law Offices of James Y. Higa telephone number 510-844-7738 for Defendants.
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Higa testified under oath as to the facts in support of his motion, as to having provided correspondence to his Clients and as to providing information with respect to obtaining new Counsel. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. Attorney James Higa's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for Defendants Rosario Bonifacio and Buenafe Sevilla is granted. Mr. Higa was instructed to inform the parties as to any future dates and of obtaining new Counsel when he serves the order. Mr. Higa is to provide a Judicial Council form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
